overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game showing a character in a white jacket walking through an industrial security checkpoint and terminal area. The environment features prominent neon signage, metal structural beams, and transitions from a narrow covered walkway to an open terminal hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered industrial walkway with orange structural bracing

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily through the industrial corridor toward the neon-lit checkpoint ahead

entered.detail: orange painted structural X-brace supporting the corridor walls
dark metal mesh fencing along the corridor sides
large illuminated sign reading NEON SECURITY in pink and white neon
exposed metal beams and ductwork overhead

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow industrial corridor with orange structural bracing and metal mesh walls. Pink neon light glows from a security sign visible in the distance, illuminating the metal grating floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: security checkpoint with armed guards flanking the entrance gate

events.description: exits narrow corridor into the security checkpoint area with visible armed guards
neon sign changes from SECURITY to TERMINAL as character approaches the gate

agents.ego_description: character walking between two armed guards and passing through the security gate

notable_agents.action: armed guard standing at checkpoint holding rifle
armed guard standing at checkpoint holding rifle

entered.detail: red metal fence gate with mesh panels marking the checkpoint boundary
orange metal handrails along the walkway edges

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes through a security checkpoint flanked by two armed guards. The neon sign overhead changes from SECURITY to TERMINAL as the character moves through the red metal gate into a more open area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open terminal hall with industrial equipment and storage containers

events.description: character turns slightly left while walking toward the back of the terminal hall

agents.ego_description: character walking through the open terminal area toward a brightly lit doorway at the far end

entered.detail: large open industrial hall with high ceilings and metal scaffolding
doorway with bright yellow interior lighting at the back of the hall
stack of metal barrels and industrial containers
illuminated control desk with glowing screen

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide industrial terminal hall with scattered equipment and storage containers. The neon TERMINAL sign remains visible to the left while the character walks toward a brightly lit yellow doorway at the far end of the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a restrictive industrial corridor that gradually opens into a vast terminal hall. It begins by trailing a character through a narrow passage defined by orange structural bracing and metal mesh walls, where a distant pink neon security sign casts a glow over the grating floor. As the character advances, the camera passes through a security checkpoint flanked by armed guards, and the overhead neon sign shifts from SECURITY to TERMINAL as they cross through a red metal gate. The scene then expands into a wide industrial hall filled with scattered equipment and storage containers, with the neon sign remaining visible to the left. Finally, the camera follows the character across the open space toward a brightly lit yellow doorway at the far end of the terminal.
